title: Youkai's Homecoming-unofficial-port
description: Unofficial 1.21.1 port of Youkai's Homecoming. Original by lcy0x1, ported by yinyuze. Contains essentially all 1.20.1 content.
body:
# Youkai's Homecoming — Unofficial 1.21.1 NeoForge Port

> An unofficial port of [**Youkai's Homecoming**](https://modrinth.com/mod/youkaishomecoming) by **lcy0x1**, bringing essentially all 1.20.1 content to Minecraft 1.21.1 / NeoForge.
>
> Ported by **yinyuze** with permission from the original author. Source code, license, and all original design credit belong to lcy0x1 and the upstream contributors.

---

## ⚠️ Attribution & License

- **Original mod**: Youkai's Homecoming by **lcy0x1** — [GitHub](https://github.com/Minecraft-LightLand/Youkai-Homecoming)
- **License**: LGPL-2.1-only (inherited from the upstream project)
- **This port**: maintained by **yinyuze**, **with permission from lcy0x1**
- Port source code: [GitHub repository](https://github.com/yinyuze/Youkaishomecoming-1.21.1-Unofficial-Port)

If you encounter a bug that exists in the **original 1.20.1 version**, please report it to the upstream repository, not here.
For bugs **introduced by this port** (1.21.1 specific), please use this project's issue tracker.

---

## What This Port Brings to 1.21.1

This port migrates the majority of 1.20.1 content into the 1.21.1 NeoForge ecosystem. Below is a feature overview.

### 🍱 Food & Cooking System

A complete Touhou-themed culinary system, fully ported and JEI-integrated:

- **Cooking Pots** — Small Iron Pot, Short Iron Pot, Stockpot (3 sizes)
- **Cuisine Board** — sushi, rolls, and assembled dishes
- **Wood Basin** — stomping recipes for batch processing
- **Steamer Pot + Rack + Lid** — stackable steam-cooking
- **Sauce Rack, Ingredient Rack, Wine Shelf** — decorative storage
- **Moka Pot, Kettle, Fermentation Barrel, Drying Rack** — coffee, tea, fermented drinks, dried goods
- **Cutting Board recipes** — over 25 custom cuts (sushi prep, ingredient processing, etc.)
- **70+ cooking pot recipes** — full Touhou cuisine lineup (ramen, dango, mochi, sushi, curries, etc.)

### 👥 Touhou Characters

Full AI behavior, trading systems, and quest mechanics:

- **Reimu Hakurei** — donation box summoning, feeding quest for her hairband, anger response when villagers are harmed
- **Cirno** — fairy AI, frog hunting (drops Frozen Frogs), trading, freezing danmaku
- **Rumia** — flesh-feeding mechanics, charged attack mode, drops hairband on Ex defeat
- Reputation system with character-specific responses
- **Donation Box** — drop emeralds/gold to summon Reimu

### 🌸 Equipment & Mechanics

All hats and hairbands ported with their original behaviors:

| Item | Effect |
|---|---|
| **Reimu's Hairband** | Creative flight, danmaku bypasses magical protection, +1 initial resource, -10% hitbox |
| **Rumia's Hairband** | +25% attack, drops mob heads (skeleton/wither skull/zombie/creeper/piglin) on kill, flesh & blood drops without knife (knife gives bonus drops), grants constant Youkaifying |
| **Cirno's Hairband** | Magic damage freezes targets and frogs, grants constant Fairy effect |
| **Cirno's Wings** | Creative flight when Fairy effect is active |
| **Suwako's Hat** | Drops from frogs eating raiders in front of villagers; grants constant Native effect |
| **Koishi's Hat** | Drops after blocking Koishi attacks N times in a row; grants constant Unconscious effect |
| **Straw Hat** | Equip on frogs (while Youkaifying/Youkaified) to make them attack pillagers |

### 🎯 Danmaku System

Powered by [danmaku_api](https://github.com/Minecraft-LightLand/DanmakuAPI) (bundled):

- Circle / Ball / Mentos / Bubble / Butterfly / Spark / Star bullet types
- 16 dye colors
- **Upgrade recipes**: 4 Ball danmaku → 1 Bubble danmaku; 4 Spark danmaku → 1 Star danmaku (per color)
- Lasers and laser pencils with upgrade paths
- Hat-based **no-consumption support**: matching-color danmaku doesn't deplete when wearing the right hat
- Damage type modifications (Reimu hairband → abyssal; etc.)

### 🍴 Food Items & Effects

- **Youkaifying / Youkaified** progression (eat flesh → become half-youkai → full youkai)
- **Flesh & Cooked Flesh** — drops from human-type mobs killed with knife under youkai effects
- **Blood Bottle** — same mechanic but requires offhand glass bottle
- **Higan Soup**, **Power Soup**, **Mushroom Soup**, **Miso Soup**, **Seafood Miso Soup**, **Poor God Soup**, **Tutu Congee**, **Kaguya Hime**, **Rice Powder Pork**, etc.
- Full coffee lineup (Espresso, Americano, Latte, Cappuccino, Macchiato, Mocha, Affogato, etc.) + remix recipes
- Tea lineup (Green, White, Black, Oolong, Cornflower, Sakura Honey, Saidi, Genmai, Tea Mocha, Green Water)
- Sushi & rolls (handled via Cuisine Board)
- Dango variants (Mitarashi, Kinako, Tsukimi, Sakura, Sweet Ormosia)

### 🌍 World Generation

- **Hakurei Shrine** — generates in cherry biomes
- **Cirno's Nest** — generates in snowy biomes
- **Youkai Nest** — generates in dark forests
- **Sakura Forest / Sakura Birch Forest / Sakura Taiga** — three custom biomes
- **Crops & wild plants** — Soybean, Red Bean, Tea, Coffea, Cucumber, Black/Red/White Grape, Mandrake Root, Udumbara
- **Mobs** — Boar (forest), Deer (forest, balanced spawn rate), Lamprey (water), Crab (river)
- **Loot modifiers** — Udumbara appears in Ancient City chests; Crab can be fished from rivers; Lamprey from any water

### 🏆 Advancements

20+ original advancements ported, including the **Feed Reimu** challenge (feed Reimu every non-meat food in the mod to obtain her hairband).

---

## 🔗 Curios Integration (Soft Dependency)

**Curios is fully optional.** The mod runs without it, but if [Curios API](https://modrinth.com/mod/curios) is installed, every hat and hairband gains a Curios capability automatically:

- ✅ Wear hats/hairbands in **any Curios slot** in addition to the vanilla head slot
- ✅ All hat mechanics check **both** the vanilla head slot **and** all Curios slots — wearing Rumia's hairband in a Curios necklace slot still drops mob heads on kill
- ✅ **Multi-hat stacking**: if you have multiple Curios slots, wearing multiple hats of different colors stacks the danmaku no-consumption support across colors
- ✅ Custom loot conditions correctly read Curios-equipped items (e.g., Rumia's head-drop loot modifier)

---

## 🧩 Mod Compatibility

- **Lithium (NeoForge)** — Compatible. The frog AI mixin uses `@ModifyReturnValue` so Suwako-hat frogs still attack pillagers even with Lithium's `frog_attackables` optimization active.
- **Kaleidoscope (Cookery)** — Compatible. Cooking-pot and cutting-board recipes are generated under the `youkaishomecoming` namespace (rather than `farmersdelight`) to prevent silent overrides.
- **Farmer's Delight** — Required. Cooking pot and cutting board recipe types come from here.
- **JEI** — Optional. All custom recipe categories registered (Cuisine, Pot Cooking, Basin, Steamer, etc.).
- **Jade** — Optional. Tooltips on cooking pots, kettles, fermentation barrels.

---

## 📦 Dependencies

### Required
- **NeoForge** 21.1.62+
- **Farmer's Delight** 1.2.4+

### Optional
- **JEI** — recipe viewing
- **Curios API** — extended slot support for hats/hairbands
- **Jade** — block tooltips
- **TerraBlender** — required for the custom Sakura biomes to generate in the Overworld

### Bundled (no separate install needed)
The mod bundles all of lcy0x1's library mods via `jarJar`:
`l2core`, `l2serial`, `l2library`, `l2modularblocks`, `l2damagetracker`, `l2itemselector`, `l2menustacker`, `l2harvester`, `danmaku_api`, `fast_projectile_api`.

---

## 🐛 Reporting Issues

Please include:
1. Minecraft version, NeoForge version, this mod's version
2. List of other installed mods (especially performance/AI mods like Lithium, ModernFix, Embeddium)
3. Steps to reproduce
4. Crash report or `latest.log` (preferably both)

Report on the [GitHub issue tracker](https://github.com/yinyuze/Youkaishomecoming-1.21.1-Unofficial-Port/issues).

---

## 📜 License

This project is licensed under **LGPL-2.1-only**, the same license as the upstream Youkai's Homecoming. The full text is in the [LICENSE](https://github.com/yinyuze/Youkaishomecoming-1.21.1-Unofficial-Port/blob/main/LICENSE) file in the source repository.

---

## 🙏 Credits

- **lcy0x1** — original creator of Youkai's Homecoming and all upstream library mods, and for granting permission for this port
- **yinyuze** — 1.21.1 NeoForge port maintainer
- **Touhou Project** by **ZUN** — for the characters and inspiration this mod is based on

This port is a community effort to bring lcy0x1's excellent work to newer Minecraft versions, with the original author's permission. All original content credit belongs to the upstream authors.
